title: Illegal Minecraft Translations
body:
### Screw the [glossary](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1xxDvR2MrPUaxXwNfn-oJX-fBerEsZkfo), embrace creativity!
Hi, I'm a slovak Minecraft Java Edition translator. Minecraft is crowd translated so anyone can contribute to it. Mojang has a glossary for terms to not translate and we can't change it. Things like redstone or mooshroom are just disallowed to translate by us. This project aims to give the ability to translate these terms even if Mojang doesn't want you to for whatever reason.

[Contribute to this resourcepack!](https://crowdin.com/project/illegalmc)
